mapper.select: SELECT id::STRING FROM node_info WHERE token = #{token} LIMIT 1
SELECT token FROM node_info WHERE token = #{token} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_info (name, ip, port, token, status, os_info, java_version, last_heartbeat, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{ip}, #{port}, #{token}, #{status}, #{osInfo}, #{javaVersion}, #{lastHeartbeat}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE node_info SET ip = #{ip}, os_info = #{osInfo}, java_version = #{javaVersion}, last_heartbeat = #{lastHeartbeat}, update_time = #{lastHeartbeat} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE node_info SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, ip FROM node_info WHERE status = 1 AND last_heartbeat < #{cutoff}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_info WHERE node_ids LIKE '%' || #{nodeId} || '%'
SELECT name FROM project_info WHERE node_ids LIKE '%' || #{nodeId} || '%'
